title: CSV Exporter Engine
description: Export list of dicts to CSV file with headers.
learningGoals: Writing CSV files with csv module
solution:
import csv
def export_csv(fn, data):
    if not data: return
    with open(fn, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        w = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=data[0].keys())
        w.writeheader()
        w.writerows(data)
solutionExpl: Exports dictionary array to CSV using DictWriter.
